# Penetration Testing Guidance


## Scope

- Focus on exposed APIs, auth flows, and privilege boundaries.
- Prioritize tests by threat model risk.

## Execution Rules

- Use approved environments only.
- Record reproduction steps, evidence, and remediation guidance.
- Re-test fixed findings before closure.
